selected_important_turn.text: I am not giving up on firewood at all. That is the most I can offer. otherwise I will see myself out
selected_important_turn.why_important: This turn is a clear escalation/ultimatum that locks the interaction into a zero-sum frame right after the opponent proposed taking all firewood. It strongly affects whether the parties can reach a mutually acceptable split and shapes the tone going forward (threatening to walk away reduces trust and flexibility).
selected_important_turn.why_improvable_or_worth_amplifying: It's a hard, all-or-nothing threat that forecloses integrative possibilities (e.g., trading other items for firewood, sharing, or splitting chores). The phrasing pressures rather than seeks a deal and is likely to make the opponent dig in or accept out of leverage rather than create a fair sustainable agreement.
selected_important_turn.better_direction: Replace the ultimatum-style stance with a firm but collaborative alternative: state your core need for firewood but invite trade options or conditional concessions (e.g., 'I need to keep X firewood; what extra water/food could you give in exchange?' or 'I can give up one piece of food if I keep two firewood'). Signal willingness to explore trades rather than to exit.

expected_effect_on_negotiation.joint_gain: increase (by reopening trade space and enabling package deals)
expected_effect_on_negotiation.fairness: increase (more balanced outcome likely if tradeoffs are explored)
expected_effect_on_negotiation.ease_of_agreement: increase (reduces brinkmanship and creates concrete trade alternatives)
expected_effect_on_negotiation.relationship: increase (reduces threat-based tension and preserves rapport)

value2reason.Low: We have some food, but could use a bit more.
value2reason.Medium: We didn't anticipate needing as much water as we've used.
value2reason.High: It's really cold and we don't have coats.

value2reason.Low: I have 2 unexpected people attending the camping and I need more food for them
value2reason.Medium: I need more water as I have a condition that makes me sweat a lot
value2reason.High: I need the firewood to create a bonfire.

dialogue.text: Hey there how are you?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I am fine friend. I need a lot of firewood though. It is freezing
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I definitely need firewood as well. We didn't anticipate it being as freezing cold as it is at night. There isn't much around us. We've also been using a lot of water, which we could use more of since we've been looking for firewood.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: Your needs are like mine. I have a condition that require  me to shower quite often. It is a shame but if I do not shower for 3 hours I will stink.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: Well fortunately if you are camping that won't be too bad. You'll blend in with the wilderness.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: My friends will run away. I will not be comfortable either. So how do we split what we have?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: If they're true friends, they won't. I'll take 2 firewood, 2 water, 3 food.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: That is very unfair ☹️
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: 2 firewood, 1 water, 3 food?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I am willing to give you 2 firewood, 1 water and 1 food.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I'll do 3 firewood, 1 water, 1 food.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I am not giving up on firewood at all. That is the most I can offer. otherwise I will see myself out
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I understand your need for firewood, but I need at least 3 for myself. Let's compromise: 2 firewood, 2 water, and 1 food for you. That way we both get what we need.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I need at least 2 firewood for the bonfire. What if I give you 1 food and 1 water in exchange for 1 firewood? That way we both get what we need.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I need at least 3 firewood for myself. Let's settle on 2 firewood, 2 water, and 1 food for you. That way we both get what we need.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I need at least 2 firewood for the bonfire. What if I give you 1 food and 1 water in exchange for 1 firewood? That way we both get what we need.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1
